effect.name: VyNil (Vinyl Effect)
effect.description:
Vynil Effect (LADSPA 1905)
Simulates an old vynil effect
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Year
parameter.comment:
The date of the recording/
playback equipment to be simulated

parameter.name: RPM
parameter.comment: The rotational speed of the platter

parameter.name: Surface Warping
parameter.comment:
The degree of variation in
height of the record surfaced

parameter.name: Crackle
parameter.comment:
The number of scratches on
the record surface

parameter.name: Wear
parameter.comment: The amount of wear on the grooves
